prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为6083→5955→5288→6778→4305，整体呈波动下降趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），2025年4305为近5年最佳，较2024年大幅前移 约2473名，显示报考热度明显升温；该校在山西物理类招生计划2021年139人、2022–2024年各135人、2025年140人、2026年146人，较2025年扩招6人（+4 .3%），小幅扩招使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第37名，近年稳定在35–37名区间，属全国顶尖211/准985层次；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面：投档线稳步提升（211第14→第3）、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率升至27%；2026年周期出现实验室爆炸事件（偏负面），但整体 关注度一般；抖音热度排名第61（一般），短视频曝光量中等；第五轮学科评估A-及以上7个：力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、 控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，工科实力突出，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等核心工科专业社会热度 持续高热；2026年山西物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；该校位于江苏南京， 对山西考生属跨省报考；2025年该校全国招生总人数中山西占比约4.68%，近年呈上升趋势，地域偏好稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年小幅 扩招（+4.3%）、物理类考生总数略降（-3.4%）、学校声誉正面等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年4305名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约4446名，区间39 46–4946名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 6083 → 5955 → 5288 → 6778 → 4305, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate intensified competition). The 2025 ranking of 4305 is the best in the past five years, significantly moving forward by approximately 2473 places compared to 2024, indicating a marked increase in application popularity. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi's Physics Category was 139 in 2021, 135 each from 2022 to 2024, 140 in 2025, and 146 in 2026, an increase of 6 students (+4.3%) compared to 2025, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211/ quasi-985 level. In the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was generally positive: the admission score line steadily improved (from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities), selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and the graduate recommendation rate rose to 27%. In the 2026 cycle, a laboratory explosion incident occurred (somewhat negative), but overall attention was moderate. Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), with medium short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science remain highly popular in society. In 2026, there are 167,419 Physics Category candidates in Shanxi, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, which is an inter-provincial application for Shanxi candidates. In 2025, Shanxi's share of the university's total national enrollment is about 4.68%, showing an upward trend in recent years, with stable regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of the 2025 ranking moving significantly forward, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4.3%), the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates (-3.4%), and the positive university reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 ranking of 4305. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4446, with a range of 3946–4946.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3946–4946, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Software Engineering, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Changkong Innovation Class, Aerospace, Electronic Information) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Information and Computing Science, Microelectronics, Internet of Things, etc.) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3946), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1279 → 1478 → 1311 → 5150 → 1990. The abnormal significant drop in ranking in 2024 (5150) may be related to the change in exam mode from liberal arts to history category; in 2025, it recovered to 1990, indicating a rebound in application popularity. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi's liberal arts/history category was 12 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and 10 in 2026, a reduction of 4 students (-28.6%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, belonging to the top-tier 211 level. Although liberal arts majors are not the university's strong field, the overall brand effect of the university still attracts; in 2025, the reputation was relatively positive (increased admission score line, increased graduate school recommendation rate); in 2026, there was a negative incident of a laboratory explosion, but it mainly affected the psychology of science and engineering applicants, with limited impact on liberal arts; Douyin popularity is average; the university's liberal arts-related disciplines have no A- or above ratings, but majors such as law, finance, and business administration, relying on the university's 211 platform, still have certain competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, finance/economics/economy is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese language/literature is recommended; in 2026, there were 63,113 history category candidates in Shanxi, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, belonging to cross-province application; the liberal arts enrollment scale is small (10-16 students), and changes in enrollment plan have a sensitive impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend of rankings in 2025, the significant reduction in enrollment in 2026 (-28.6%) and the significant decrease in the total number of history category candidates (-25.6%) roughly offset each other, and the stable brand effect of the university, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases) based on the 1990 ranking in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1629, with a range of 1336-1922.
